raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tahm Nasa- 
reëram/ preeksch tahs Sa-eefcha- 
nas Telts Durwim to Galwu fa- 
was Apfohliſchanas nods iht/ un 
tohs Galwas Mattus winna Ap- 
fohlischanas xenit / un us to Ug- 
guni liſt/ kas appakſch to Pateiſ- 
ſchanas-Uppuri irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs 
to wahritu Preekſch-Plezzu no ta 
Anna xenit / un weenu nerandse- 
tu Rauschu no ta Kurtwja / un 
weenu nerandsetu Karraſchu / un 
buhs to us ta Nasareëta Rohku 
liſt/ pehz ka wiſch ſawus Mat- 
tus apkaht nodsinnis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs 
tohs kuſtinaht / par weenu Kuſti- 
naschanas-Uppuri preekſch to 
KUNGU / tas irr weena fwehta 
Leeta preekſch to Preesteri / lihſ 
ar to Kruhti ta Kuſtinaschanas- 
Uppura/un ar to Preekſch-Plezzu 
ta Pazelschanas-Uppura/ un pehz 
warr tas NasareërisWihnu dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi irr ta Nasareëra 
Banfiba/ kas tam KUNGAM 
fawu Uppuri fawas Sawadibas 
dehtfohla/pahri pahr to/ fo wiſch- 
na Rohka wehl ceſpehj / ſawas 
Apfohliſchanas pehz / ka wiſch 
fohlijis irr / ta buhs tam darriht/ 
pehz fawas Sawadibas Banfli- 
bas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runna- 
ja us Mohsu/un fazzija : Runna 
us Aäronu un winna Dehleem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un fakki: Ta buhs junis tehs Iſ 
raëta Behrnuſ fwhehtiht / un u 
teein fazzijht:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tas KUNGS ten 
fwehti/ un teiw pafarga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tas KUNGS fawi 
Waigu pahr tew apgaifino / u 
irr tew ſchehligs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tas KUNGS fawi 
Waigu pahr tew zelt / un doh 
tew Meern.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs teem mannu 
Wahrdü pahr teem Israëta Behr- 
neem liſt / un es tohs fwehtifchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta VII. Nodalla.
Rad tas Dſihwoſlis bija usſelts/tad uppureja te 
Ziltu Wirſneeki/ pirnak wiſee fohpà : 1 / 2. 
Un tad us Deewa Pawehlefchanu ikatrs fe 
wiſchki : 11. &c. Wiſſu Uppuro faſkaitihts 
Pulks / fo tee diwpadeſmits Wirſneeki uppu- 
rejschi : 84. Ka un kurra Weeta Deewa ar 
Mohsu runnajis : 89.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas notikke tai Deená 
Kad Mohsus bija pabei 
dsís to Dſihwoſli uhs 
zelt / un to bija fwaidijs / un te 
ar wiſeem winna Rihkeem bija 
ceswehtijs/ lihds ar to Altari/ un 
wiſeem winna Rihkeem / kad 
wiſch to bija fwaidijs un ee- 
swehtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad uppureja tee Israëta 
Wirſneeki/ tee Augſtakee wiſxi 
Tehwu Namuná ; Schee irr to 
Ziltu Wirſneeki / kas wiſs teem 
bija/ kas ſkaititi bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee neffe ſawu Uppur 
preekſch to KUNGU/ ſechas Kul 
bas / un diwpadeſmits Wehr- 
fchus / weenn Kulbu preekſch diw 
Mm
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
